description: A logistics officer must ensure all equipment and personnel baggage being redeployed complies with customs regulations of the home country.

nodes.task_description: Generate customs declaration forms for all shipping containers of equipment.

expected_outcome.expected: Officer accurately completes all required customs paperwork.

nodes.task_description: Brief all personnel on prohibited items they cannot bring back in their personal baggage.

expected_outcome.expected: Officer effectively communicates the customs rules to all personnel.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with customs officials to schedule inspections of the equipment and baggage upon arrival.

expected_outcome.expected: Officer successfully coordinates with external agencies to ensure a smooth customs process.
